FOR DEFTS: PARTIES IN PRO PER:MARCELO MONTEIRO AND ANDREYA MONTEIRO

MATTER COMES ON CALENDAR THIS DATE. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS INFORM THE COURT THAT THEY HAVE FILED BANKRUPTCY IN THE EASTERN DISTRICT. COURT ORDERS MATTER TO THEREFORE BE STAYED PENDING BANKRUPTCY PROCEEDINGS.

TELEPHONE CALL MADE BY CLERK TO THE DEFENDANTS THIS AFTERNOON, INFORMING THEM THAT WE NEED
A "NOTICE OF BANKRUPTCY" OR SOME PROOF OF FILING THE BANKRUPTCY PETN. MR. MONTEIRO INDICA
ATED THAT HE WILL BRING THE PAPERS TO THE COURT ON THURSDAY AFTERNOON, JUNE 15, 2006.

CLERK SENDS E-MAIL TO PRESIDING JUDGE, INDICATING SITUATION AND STATUS OF THE FOLLOW-UP.

JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK-BBSURRATT; NOT REPORTED. (DEPT. 602)
